basis: Contains the estate pricing remediation, mutation harness, deterministic estate reproduction, release-ready proof matrix and controlled-release proof matrix.
Contains playbook /run surfaces, Monthly Reporting, Custom Reporting and GMI quarterly fulfilment infrastructure that are absent or older on work/estate-market-restoration.
Contains the later interaction spine, runtime binding, durable persistence, claim-boundary authority and four-pillar integration sequence through b71752436.
Diff from construction to work deletes the current runtime proof modules and fulfilment implementations rather than adding unique runtime capability to construction.
